description: Composition Cream floral print sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has sheer ribbon detailing around the armhole, round neckline with small ruffles and a keyhole button closure at the back Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33"
